context_only: ### Problem 1: Agents Skip Straight to Spec Writing
### Problem 4: tp's Core Philosophy Is Under-Articulated

tasks.title: Add convergence fields to Workflow struct
tasks.description: Add ReviewCleanRounds and AuditCleanRounds to the Workflow struct with custom UnmarshalJSON that distinguishes absent from explicit-zero.
tasks.acceptance: Workflow struct has ReviewCleanRounds and AuditCleanRounds int fields with json tags. Custom UnmarshalJSON uses *int pointers: nil→2, explicit 0→preserved. Existing tests pass.
tasks.closed_reason: Workflow struct has ReviewCleanRounds and AuditCleanRounds int fields with json tags (no omitempty). Custom UnmarshalJSON uses *int pointers: nil→2, explicit 0→preserved. All tests pass, linter clean.

tasks.title: Validate convergence fields in tp validate
tasks.description: Add range 1-10 validation for convergence fields and include workflow key in ValidationResult output.
tasks.acceptance: tp validate rejects values outside 1-10 with parameterized error. Explicit 0 is validate-time error only. Workflow key always in output.
tasks.closed_reason: tp validate rejects values outside 1-10 with 'review_clean_rounds must be between 1 and 10'. Explicit 0 is validate-time error. Workflow key always in output.

tasks.title: Set convergence defaults in tp init
tasks.description: Set ReviewCleanRounds: 2 and AuditCleanRounds: 2 in the generated Workflow struct.
tasks.acceptance: tp init generates task file with review_clean_rounds: 2 and audit_clean_rounds: 2. Existing init tests pass.
tasks.closed_reason: tp init generates task file with review_clean_rounds: 2 and audit_clean_rounds: 2 in workflow section. TestValidateStrict passes.

tasks.title: Add --workflow flag to tp set
tasks.description: Add --workflow flag that operates on TaskFile.Workflow for convergence fields.
tasks.acceptance: tp set --workflow review_clean_rounds=3 works. Echoes only supplied fields. Rejects unknown, read-only, zero-pair, and out-of-range with distinct errors.
tasks.closed_reason: tp set --workflow review_clean_rounds=3 works. Echoes only supplied fields. Rejects unknown, read-only (quality_gate with distinct error), zero-pair, and out-of-range values.

tasks.title: Verify convergence fields in tp plan output
tasks.description: Verify that tp plan passes through convergence fields and tp plan --minimal omits workflow.
tasks.acceptance: tp plan includes review_clean_rounds and audit_clean_rounds in workflow. tp plan --minimal omits workflow block.
tasks.closed_reason: tp plan includes review_clean_rounds and audit_clean_rounds in workflow. tp plan --minimal omits workflow block via pointer+omitempty.

tasks.title: Rewrite SKILL.md with interview phase
tasks.description: Complete rewrite of SKILL.md with interview, convergence enforcement, condensed workflows.
tasks.acceptance: SKILL.md is 90-120 lines. All 8 interview steps traceable. NON-NEGOTIABLE blocks verbatim.

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md description with triggers
tasks.description: Update frontmatter description with interview mention and trigger phrases.
tasks.acceptance: Description includes 'Interviews user to resolve ambiguities' and 'Use when' trigger phrases. *.tasks.json trigger noted.

tasks.title: Create REFERENCE.md from current SKILL.md
tasks.description: Create REFERENCE.md with 9 sections migrated verbatim from current SKILL.md.
tasks.acceptance: REFERENCE.md has 9 sections in specified order. Content migrated verbatim. Editorial reformatting permitted.

tasks.title: Test migration with existing task files
tasks.description: Verify existing task files work unchanged with new convergence fields.
tasks.acceptance: Existing task files without convergence fields load with defaults. tp validate --strict does not flag missing fields. tp import/add unchanged.
